name: Sloppy Turkey Spuds
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce potatoes with tines of fork; microwave on HIGH for 20 to 22 minutes until potatoes are fork-tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, sauté turkey until no longer pink, about 6 minutes.
3. Add onion, bell pepper and mushrooms; sauté, stirring, for 3 minutes.
4. Stir in marinara sauce; bring to boil. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper; stir in parsley.
5. Place potatoes on 4 plates; split and fluff. Top potatoes with turkey mixture and cheese, dividing equally.
